didnt_work: **MANDATORY-pointer blindness (the big miss):** resumed onto PLAN.md, treated the program spine as the complete ruleset, never loaded the doc-writing-guidelines that CLAUDE.md marks MANDATORY. A mandate with no data-path gate is advisory. Fix: PLAN step 2 now forces the load; candidate PreToolUse hook named in the RCA.
`rg -r*` flag bundle recurred **5× total** (2× this session, both self-caught from mangled output). `rg -rn` = `--replace n`. A hook is the only real fix; advisory rules don't bind it.
CLI-gate quirk: `gh workflow list --all` (read-only) gets gated; the approval `touch` and the command must be in SEPARATE Bash calls (gate fires before the touch runs in a compound command).

Render env-group GET is `/v1/env-groups/<id>` returns 404 for the per-service evm- IDs; the real group IDs come from `/v1/env-groups?limit=N` (Development/Production), separate from per-service `/services/<id>/env-vars`.
Global guidelines file is a symlink: `~/.claude/doc-writing-guidelines.md` → `~/.claude/conventions/doc-writing.md`. Edit the target; the symlink path refuses writes.
